question.label: Reset timing
question.name: Is now a good time for this conversation, or should we reschedule?
question.description: Direct reset to confirm whether the session should continue at all.

assessment.note: Skip on a direct reset confirms the session is non-functional. [SESSION NON-FUNCTIONAL: 3+ consecutive non-answers. Queue cleared.]

new_queue.label: Success definition
new_queue.name: What would make this quarter clearly successful for you — in one sentence?
